overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a desert village with distinctive Dogon-style adobe architecture. The character walks through open areas and narrow passages between tall conical mud-brick structures under bright midday sun. The environment features warm earth tones, sparse vegetation, and no other inhabitants.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert village plaza with tall conical adobe towers

events.description: character performs a 180-degree spin and begins walking back toward the camera's original position

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the adobe village, exploring the open areas between conical mud-brick structures

entered.detail: tall pointed mud-brick tower with weathered texture, characteristic of Dogon architecture
circular hut with conical thatched roof, traditional storage structure
tall adobe wall with rough texture forming the side of a building
cluster of palm trees visible on the horizon beyond the village

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit desert village with distinctive tall conical adobe towers. The ground is reddish dirt with sparse vegetation. At around 7 seconds, the character spins around and begins walking back, revealing more of the open plaza and the granary structures scattered throughout the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with scattered adobe buildings and approaching spires

events.description: character turns left and continues walking perpendicular to previous path
approaching narrower corridor between tall adobe walls, space becoming more enclosed

agents.ego_description: navigating through the village square, turning left to explore deeper into the settlement toward taller structures

entered.detail: prominent tall pointed adobe spire rising above the other structures
crumbling low wall made of mud bricks, partially collapsed
small dwelling with steep conical roof

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks through a more open village square, passing low crumbling walls. A prominent tall adobe spire dominates the center view ahead. The character approaches a narrower passage between buildings, transitioning from the open plaza toward more enclosed alleyways.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between high adobe walls with debris scattered on ground

events.description: entering narrow corridor between tall adobe walls, sky visibility reduced to a strip overhead
character stops walking and looks around the narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the narrow passage between tall walls, observing the adobe architecture up close

entered.detail: tall vertical adobe wall casting deep shadow, rough mud texture
matching tall adobe wall on the right side of the narrow passage
rocks and rubble scattered across the dirt floor of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor between towering adobe walls, transitioning from the open village square to an enclosed alleyway. The ground is littered with debris and rubble. The tall spire that was distant is now approached closely. At the end of the segment, the character stops to look around the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep narrow alley between high adobe walls with overhead sky visible

events.description: character comes to a complete stop and stands still, looking around the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: standing still in the narrow alley, observing the surrounding adobe walls and dead end ahead

entered.detail: corner of adobe building blocking the path ahead, creating a dead end
pile of broken mud bricks and debris against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves slowly through the deepest part of the narrow alley, where the walls create a shaded corridor with diffused lighting. Rubble piles line the walls. The character stops near a corner structure that blocks the path ahead, standing still to observe the enclosed adobe environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit desert village that gradually transitions from an open plaza into a confined, shaded alleyway. It begins with the character walking across reddish dirt among tall conical adobe towers before spinning around to reveal the scattered granary structures of the settlement. As the character turns left, the scene opens into a village square with low crumbling walls, moving steadily toward a prominent adobe spire that dominates the horizon. The camera then shifts from the open plaza into a narrow corridor of towering mud-brick walls, where the bright midday sun gives way to diffused lighting and the ground becomes littered with rubble. Finally, the movement slows as the character enters the deepest part of the shaded alley, coming to a halt beside a corner structure that blocks the path.
